Values.value: [OH_Ops TN Archive]: Starting. Archiving after %archiveAfterDays% days. Deleting after %deleteAfterDays% days.

Hello Team,
Archival job has completed successfully. %archivedCount% rows were archived in this run.
Archive Service Start Time: %startTime_archive%.
Archive Service End Time: %endTime_archive%.
Thanks, OneHub webMethods

Hello Team,
Delete job has completed successfully. %deletedCount% rows were deleted in this run.
Delete Service Start Time: %startTime_delete%.
Delete Service End Time: %endTime_delete%.
Thanks, OneHub webMethods

Hello All,
Archival and Delete job failed to run. Please see below error logs.

Archival and Delete job failed to run. Please see below error logs. For More details see the server log of this service instance.
